title: Sandbox Manifest
description: Describes the sandbox/workspace a runtime adapter mounts for an agent run. Captures model + adapter ids, file mounts, env vars (referenced not inlined), tool surface, and the runtime provider. Referenced from Run.sandbox_manifest_ref.

manifest_version.description: SemVer of the manifest schema this document targets.

runtime_provider.description: Runtime provider id. Example: openai-agents-sdk, anthropic-sdk, local-stub.

adapter_ids.description: LoRA/persona adapter ids in load order.

mounts.description: Filesystem mounts attached to the sandbox.

env_refs.description: Names of env vars the adapter expects to be set (e.g. OPENAI_API_KEY). Values are NOT inlined.

tool_surface.description: Tools exposed inside the sandbox at run start.

tool_name.description: Tool identifier as registered in the tool registry.

schema_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the tool's canonicalized JSON schema.

determinism.description: Reproducibility knobs in effect for the sandbox.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the manifest was created.
